fields.name: description
fields.description: A short (3-5 word) description of the task

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The task for the agent to perform

fields.name: subagent_type
fields.description: The type of specialized agent to use for this task

fields.name: model
fields.description: Optional model override for this agent. Takes precedence over the agent definition's model frontmatter. If omitted, uses the agent definition's model, or inherits from the parent.

fields.name: run_in_background
fields.description: Set to true to run this agent in the background. You will be notified when it completes.

fields.name: command
fields.description: The command to execute

fields.name: timeout
fields.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds (max 600000)

fields.name: task_id
fields.description: The task ID to get output from

fields.name: block
fields.description: Whether to wait for completion

fields.name: timeout
fields.description: Max wait time in ms

fields.name: allowedPrompts
fields.description: Prompt-based permissions needed to implement the plan. These describe categories of actions rather than specific commands.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: Semantic description of the action, e.g. "run tests", "install dependencies"

fields.name: file_path
fields.description: The absolute path to the file to modify

fields.name: old_string
fields.description: The text to replace

fields.name: new_string
fields.description: The text to replace it with (must be different from old_string)

fields.name: replace_all
fields.description: Replace all occurrences of old_string (default false)

fields.name: file_path
fields.description: The absolute path to the file to read

fields.name: offset
fields.description: The line number to start reading from. Only provide if the file is too large to read at once

fields.name: limit
fields.description: The number of lines to read. Only provide if the file is too large to read at once.

fields.name: pages
fields.description: Page range for PDF files (e.g., "1-5", "3", "10-20"). Only applicable to PDF files. Maximum 20 pages per request.

fields.name: file_path
fields.description: The absolute path to the file to write (must be absolute, not relative)

fields.name: content
fields.description: The content to write to the file

fields.name: pattern
fields.description: The glob pattern to match files against

fields.name: path
fields.description: The directory to search in. If not specified, the current working directory will be used. IMPORTANT: Omit this field to use the default directory. DO NOT enter "undefined" or "null" - simply omit it for the default behavior. Must be a valid directory path if provided.

fields.name: pattern
fields.description: The regular expression pattern to search for in file contents

fields.name: path
fields.description: File or directory to search in (rg PATH). Defaults to current working directory.

fields.name: task_id
fields.description: The ID of the background task to stop

fields.name: shell_id
fields.description: Deprecated: use task_id instead

fields.name: server
fields.description: Optional server name to filter resources by

fields.name: notebook_path
fields.description: The absolute path to the Jupyter notebook file to edit (must be absolute, not relative)

fields.name: cell_id
fields.description: The ID of the cell to edit. When inserting a new cell, the new cell will be inserted after the cell with this ID, or at the beginning if not specified.

fields.name: new_source
fields.description: The new source for the cell

fields.name: cell_type
fields.description: The type of the cell (code or markdown). If not specified, it defaults to the current cell type. If using edit_mode=insert, this is required.

fields.name: edit_mode
fields.description: The type of edit to make (replace, insert, delete). Defaults to replace.

fields.name: server
fields.description: The MCP server name

fields.name: uri
fields.description: The resource URI to read

fields.name: todos
fields.description: The updated todo list

fields.name: url
fields.description: The URL to fetch content from

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The prompt to run on the fetched content

fields.name: query
fields.description: The search query to use

fields.name: allowed_domains
fields.description: Only include search results from these domains

fields.name: blocked_domains
fields.description: Never include search results from these domains

fields.name: question
fields.description: The complete question to ask the user. Should be clear, specific, and end with a question mark. Example: "Which library should we use for date formatting?" If multiSelect is true, phrase it accordingly, e.g. "Which features do you want to enable?"

fields.name: header
fields.description: Very short label displayed as a chip/tag (max 12 chars). Examples: "Auth method", "Library", "Approach".

fields.name: label
fields.description: The display text for this option that the user will see and select. Should be concise (1-5 words) and clearly describe the choice.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Explanation of what this option means or what will happen if chosen. Useful for providing context about trade-offs or implications.

fields.name: preview
fields.description: Optional preview content rendered when this option is focused. Use for mockups, code snippets, or visual comparisons that help users compare options. See the tool description for the expected content format.

fields.name: subject
fields.description: A brief title for the task

fields.name: description
fields.description: What needs to be done

fields.name: activeForm
fields.description: Present continuous form shown in spinner when in_progress (e.g., "Running tests")

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Arbitrary metadata to attach to the task

fields.name: taskId
fields.description: The ID of the task to retrieve

fields.name: taskId
fields.description: The ID of the task to update

fields.name: subject
fields.description: New subject for the task

fields.name: description
fields.description: New description for the task

fields.name: activeForm
fields.description: Present continuous form shown in spinner when in_progress (e.g., "Running tests")

fields.name: status
fields.description: New status for the task

fields.name: addBlocks
fields.description: Task IDs that this task blocks

fields.name: addBlockedBy
fields.description: Task IDs that block this task

fields.name: owner
fields.description: New owner for the task

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Metadata keys to merge into the task. Set a key to null to delete it.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Optional name for a new worktree. Each "/"-separated segment may contain only letters, digits, dots, underscores, and dashes; max 64 chars total. A random name is generated if not provided. Mutually exclusive with `path`.

fields.name: path
fields.description: Path to an existing worktree of the current repository to switch into instead of creating a new one. Must appear in `git worktree list` for the current repo. Mutually exclusive with `name`.

fields.name: action
fields.description: "keep" leaves the worktree and branch on disk; "remove" deletes both.

fields.name: discard_changes
fields.description: Required true when action is "remove" and the worktree has uncommitted files or unmerged commits. The tool will refuse and list them otherwise.
